adapter_certificates.interpretation: failed strict certificates are preserved independently from descriptive lens metrics

native_lens.application: nvidia-modelopt-nvfp4-fp8-exact-forward-identity-ste fitted lens applied to strictly rehashed NVIDIA NVFP4/FP8 residuals
native_lens.surrogate_backward: identity STE; not the literal derivative of quantized rounding
native_lens.verification_scope: exact pinned production run; not a generic portable fit

public_lens.application: public Qwen3.6-27B FP16 lens with unpublished fit-time precision and quantization applied to NVFP4/FP8 residuals

runtime.timing_scope: artifact resolution and validation through readout

candidate_probe.context: teacher-forced original turn-3 reasoning after source inspection, ending after the opening backtick in 'the variable is actually `'
candidate_probe.interpretation: relative token preference only; both alternatives are outside the middle-layer top 10
candidate_probe.primary_comparison: same-context first token co versus cot

secondary_unequal_bpe_sequence_totals.warning: cothm has three BPE tokens and cotm has two; totals are not the primary middle-layer comparison

limitations: exact frozen-token eager replay, not retained activations from the original compiled MTP run
native lens uses an identity-STE surrogate and only ten 128-token WikiText fit prompts
public lens fit-time precision and quantization are unpublished
11.9K-15.7K code-agent contexts are out of distribution for the native fit corpus
the task prompt already supplied the file, line, exception, and undefined spelling
the ordinary logit lens exposes the candidate preference at least as consistently as either J-lens
the fixed nine-layer slice was selected for exploratory reporting after the run, not preregistered
the isolated preflight residual digest differs from the sequential all-stage request-9 digest
scope: validated descriptive replay of frozen certified SWE contexts; not original hidden-state capture or causal intervention
